'''Maugina''', also known as '''Desev Beta''',<ref name="TWW">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref> was a [[Binary star/Legends|binary star]] with [[Desev]] in the [[Desev system]]. It was a [[White dwarf/Legends|white dwarf]].<ref name="GatORW" />

{{Star-stub}}
